product: Agent Bricks Knowledge Assistant and Supervisor Agent are now available in…
tagline: Knowledge Assistant and Supervisor Agent are now available in the ap south 1 (Mumbai) AWS region.
what_it_does: Knowledge Assistant and Supervisor Agent are now available in the ap south 1 (Mumbai) AWS region. Cross geo processing must be enabled for this region. For the full list of supported regions, see Features with limited regional availability.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: Knowledge Assistant and Supervisor Agent are now available in the ap south 1 (Mumbai) AWS region. Cross geo processing must be enabled for this region.
key_takeaway: Knowledge Assistant and Supervisor Agent are now available in the ap south 1 (Mumbai) AWS region.
